title: Study
description: Formal scope of a research project (one place study, one name study, family reconstruction, etc.). ID comes from the map key in the parent structure.

status.description: Current status of the study (validated against study_statuses vocabulary)

date_range.description: Temporal scope as a GLX date string, typically a range (e.g., "FROM 1840 TO 1890")

places.description: References to Place entities in scope

sources.description: References to Source entities in scope

properties.description: Vocabulary-extensible metadata (e.g., source_types in scope, surname variants for one-name studies)

notes.description: Free-form notes about the study (research objectives, methodology, etc.)
